overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character descending in an elevator, traversing a hallway, emerging onto a neon-lit rooftop plaza, ascending stairs, and walking along an elevated skybridge with panoramic views of Night City. The footage showcases the game's signature cyberpunk aesthetic with vibrant neon lighting, futuristic architecture, and atmospheric urban environments.

events.description: elevator doors open revealing hallway beyond

agents.ego_description: standing still inside the descending elevator, facing the control panel

entered.detail: futuristic digital panel displaying floor information with down arrows and '10 APARTMENTS' text
dark metallic sliding doors with teal accent lighting
vertical teal illuminated stripe running along the left wall
recessed circular ceiling lights providing ambient illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view inside a futuristic elevator descending through an apartment building. The interior features dark metallic walls with teal accent lighting and a digital control panel. The elevator doors open at the end of the segment, revealing the hallway beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment building hallway with advertisement displays

events.description: approaching and passing through glass exit doors leading to exterior rooftop area

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor toward the exit, passing a large advertisement poster and vending machine

smooth beige walls with horizontal teal accent lighting near the ceiling
white vending machine with pink illuminated display screen
glass double doors with metal frames leading to the exterior
green illuminated exit sign above the glass doors
beige square tiles covering the hallway floor

segments.scene_description: The character exits the elevator and walks through a modern hallway featuring a large travel advertisement, a vending machine with pink lighting, and teal accent lights. The segment ends as the character approaches and passes through glass exit doors leading outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop pedestrian plaza with city views

events.description: emerging from indoor lighting to outdoor area with vibrant neon illumination and ambient city glow
turning to look over the railing at the adjacent apartment buildings

agents.ego_description: walking across the rooftop plaza, pausing to look over the railing at the surrounding architecture

walking across the plaza in the distance

entered.detail: transparent glass safety barriers with metal frames lining the walkway edge
tall multi-story residential towers with illuminated windows and colorful accent panels

broad concrete plaza surface with metal drainage grates

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a rooftop plaza with stunning views of Night City's residential towers. The area is illuminated by vibrant pink neon billboards and the glow from surrounding apartment windows. The character walks past NPCs and pauses to look over the glass railing at the urban landscape below.

events.description: entering stairwell from rooftop plaza and beginning ascent

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs steadily, passing another character on the way up

notable_agents.action: ascending the stairs ahead, wearing light-colored clothing

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal edge strips and drainage channels
dark green painted concrete walls with industrial texture
long fluorescent tube lights mounted on the ceiling providing greenish illumination
green painted metal railings along the right side of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character enters an industrial stairwell with green-tinted lighting and begins ascending the concrete steps. The stairwell features metal handrails and fluorescent tube lights. Another character is seen climbing ahead on the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated skybridge with panoramic city views

events.description: exiting stairwell onto covered elevated walkway with open sides overlooking the city

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the skybridge, observing the distant cityscape and mountains through the open sides

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure providing partial cover while allowing side views
panoramic view of Night City with buildings, roads, and infrastructure visible below
series of illuminated digital billboards mounted on the left wall displaying various advertisements
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon beyond the city

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an elevated skybridge offering expansive views of Night City and the distant mountains. The walkway is partially covered with a roof structure but features open sides with glass railings. Neon advertisements line the walls as the character walks toward the horizon, with the city sprawling below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the enclosed depths of a futuristic building to an expansive, high-altitude vista of Night City. It begins inside a descending elevator with dark metallic walls and teal accents, moving forward as the doors slide open to reveal a modern hallway. As the camera passes a pink-lit vending machine and a large travel advertisement, the scene shifts from the interior corridor through glass exit doors and onto a vibrant rooftop plaza illuminated by pink neon billboards. The perspective then transitions into a green-tinted industrial stairwell, ascending concrete steps past another figure before emerging onto an elevated skybridge. Finally, the view opens completely to a panoramic horizon of sprawling urban towers and distant mountains, with the camera gliding along the glass-railed walkway toward the city skyline.
